notes: FHIR R4 profile variant for Eswatini (national client registry). Adaptor surface is builder-centric (addToBundle, mapValues, b.* resource builders) and posts transaction Bundles to a FHIR R4 server. Modelled as standard FHIR R4 REST + transaction Bundle. Server base taken from the adaptor's own mapValues example (http://172.209.216.154:3447/fhir). Profile-specific ValueSets/extensions are not fully enumerated.
